name: realestate
description: A full-stack real estate web app with buyer/seller roles and an AI-powered recommendation engine.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
